title: Optimised For Life
description:
A modpack to optimise Minecraft to its full potential.

On my ROG Strix G513RC_G513RC it could run 95-144 fps with 40 chunks.

Have Fun.
body:
# ABANDONED PERMENANTLY
## Due to loss of interest, better options available, and too many extra mods included, i decided to abandon this modpack, and move on with other projects.

# An official version of OFL- Optimised For Life.

- made to push Minecraft for a smooth frame rate.



## **Versions area wasnt needed anymore so i removed it**

![removed versions area](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f15643bac21bf59b7dc5e7576d7165d7c62c2d8.png)


(pictures are pretty outdated)
